reproducibility_contract: Path A runs the public from-scratch pipeline from official data for transparent experimentation. Path B uses the frozen row-aligned prediction CSVs for bit-exact reproduction of the archived PairUAV online result.
public_from_scratch_note: The public from-scratch path trains public distance heads and a simple row-local heading baseline. It is intended for transparent end-to-end reproduction and independent experimentation, not bit-exact reproduction of the archived online score.
compliance_note: Official predictions are per-pair functions with fixed parameters. The released path does not use test-set graph optimization, batch sorting, hidden-neighbor revision, retrieval over the hidden test set, global assignment, clustering, or cross-sample bookkeeping.
